env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.reason: Needed by the LangChain OpenAI chat clients used by the router and specialist agents.

env.name: OPENAI_MODEL
env.reason: Optional override for the chat model name; defaults to gpt-5.4 when unset.

env.name: TUTOR_LEARNER_ID
env.reason: Optional stable learner identifier when you want simulator runs to reuse the same learner profile.

env.name: TUTOR_TTS_AUTOPLAY
env.reason: Optional toggle for whether the speak_german tool should try to play synthesized audio automatically.

env.name: TUTOR_TTS_VOICE
env.reason: Optional macOS say voice override used by the speak_german tool when local TTS is exercised live.

files.reason: Optional SQLite file path for durable learner progress; the adapter creates an isolated simulator-local database when unset.
Optional SQLite file path for the LangGraph checkpoint store; the adapter creates an isolated simulator-local checkpoint database when unset.
Optional directory path where the speak_german tool writes synthesized audio files when TTS is enabled.
